leadText: Lakeside Cave (Japanese: 湖畔の洞窟 Cave by the Lakeshore) is a location in the Galar region. It connects to Ballimere Lake.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Lakeside Cave is a large, open cave that can only be accessed through Ballimere Lake. It has two ways of access, from the upper and lower parts of Ballimere Lake.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Shiny Stone Sw Sh Hidden items [ edit | edit source ] Every item that reappears every day can also regenerate as a Wishing Piece at a 1% chance.
